use_cases: Primary navigation dock for web applications mimicking macOS-style taskbar
Quick-access icon menu for frequently used app features
Floating navigation bar with glass-morphism aesthetic
Desktop-style dock for navigation on hybrid platforms
Minimal icon launcher for app sections or pages
ai_summary: A minimal glass-morphism dock navigation component featuring macOS-style icon buttons with hover animations including scale, lift, and glow effects. Uses backdrop blur and semi-transparent styling for a modern frosted glass aesthetic. Supports custom icons via Lucide React icons library with mouse hover state management.
